title: Adventure Tents
description: This Data pack adds a sleeping bag and 3 tent sizes to the vanilla Minecraft
body:
Adventure Tents is designed for explorers and long journeys adding portable, placeable survival tents that let you set up camp anywhere, sleep to make it day and pack everything up. to sleep click on the pillow which is the white carpet in the tent. It includes Small, Medium, and Large tents all in full color variants. Adventure Tents also adds sleeping bags in every color so you dont have to carry your tent arround for short journies. Craftable recovery tent bags for each size of tent allows you to safely reclaim and repack existing tents should you loose your tent bag. Players can upgrade tents from Small → Medium → Large. Just craft the medium tent upgrade template and use it in the smithing table with your small tent bag and a piece of iron to get the medim tent upgrade then pack your small tent with it and you will get a medium tent in return, same goes for the large tent but a dimond is required in the smithing table. Tents automatically save the barrels contents when packed and as they upgrade, making it easy to travel while keeping your gear safe and organized. 

- Watch the video to see how it works https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=51CE04dIbqg 

* Depending on how many datapacks you have you may have to run /function atent:load
  
* if you have any bugs or issues please click the links tab and visit my Git hub issues tracker to let me know. I hope you enjoy this data pack
